title: wedelia helianthoides subsp. papposa
intro: Wedelia helianthoides subsp. papposa is a type of flowering plant, also known as Siam Weed or Wedelia, which belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and act as an antiseptic. Wedelia helianthoides subsp. papposa can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in topical applications for skin conditions and wounds.
